query:
SELECT 
  id,
  sport,
  gameDate,
  awayTeam,
  homeTeam,
  startTimeEst,
  gameStatus,
  awayScore,
  homeScore,
  awayBookSpread,
  homeBookSpread,
  bookTotal,
  awayML,
  homeML,
  spreadAwayBetsPct,
  spreadAwayMoneyPct,
  totalOverBetsPct,
  totalOverMoneyPct,
  mlAwayBetsPct,
  mlAwayMoneyPct,
  sortOrder,
  publishedToFeed,
  publishedModel,
  awayModelSpread,
  homeModelSpread,
  modelTotal,
  modelAwayML,
  createdAt
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NHL'
ORDER BY gameDate, sortOrder, startTimeEst;
command:

  awayModelSpread,
  homeModelSpread,
  modelTotal,
  modelAwayML,
  createdAt
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NHL'
ORDER BY gameDate, sortOrder, startTimeEst;
